subject: Allister, the Ghost-type Gym Leader of Stow-on-Side, depicted as a small dark-haired figure in a masked uniform flanked by two floating ghost-type pokeballs
description: A small young figure stands centered against a pale gridded backdrop, framed by two floating purple-glowing Pokeball-like orbs marked with curling ghost symbols. The figure wears a dark tailored uniform jacket over a plaid kilt-like skirt, with a black-and-white mask covering the lower half of the face and a shock of dark hair falling across the brow. The pose is small and reserved, hands tucked close. The composition is portrait-mode with strong central symmetry, the two glowing orbs acting as iconographic flanks. Color palette is cool: deep purples and inky blacks against a near-white background, with the Trainer-card frame in yellow at the borders.
foreground: masked young figure in dark uniform jacket and plaid skirt, flanked by two floating ghost-type orbs
background: pale near-white empty studio space with faint grid lines
emotion: withdrawn, reserved, quietly intense; body language closed and shy
